# Test script: ./runtests

```
     1	#!/bin/zsh
     2	
     3	rm -f *.f32
     4	rm -f *.pwlr
     5	rm -f *.pwpr
     6	rm -f *.pfpl
     7	rm -f *.sz3
     8	rm -f *.zfp
     9	rm -f *.csv
    10	
    11	#!/bin/sh
    12	
    13	echo "# Test script: $0"
    14	echo
    15	
    16	echo "\`\`\`"
    17	cat -n "$0"
    18	echo "\`\`\`"
    19	
    20	echo
    21	
    22	python3 run-all-f32-compression-tests.py -f ./datasets/ps_data.f32   -tfrom 0.01 -tto 0.03 -tstep 0.001
    23	mv results.csv ps_data.csv
    24	rm -f *.f32
    25	rm -f *.pwlr
    26	rm -f *.pwpr
    27	rm -f *.pfpl
    28	rm -f *.sz3
    29	rm -f *.zfp
    30	
    31	python3 run-all-f32-compression-tests.py -f ./datasets/obs_spitzer_50000.f32 -tfrom 1.0 -tto 10.0 -tstep 0.1
    32	
    33	mv results.csv obs_spitzer.csv
    34	rm -f *.f32
    35	rm -f *.pwlr
    36	rm -f *.pwpr
    37	rm -f *.pfpl
    38	rm -f *.sz3
    39	rm -f *.zfp
    40	
    41	python3 run-all-f32-compression-tests.py -f ./datasets/obs_temp_50000.f32    -tfrom 1.0 -tto 10.0 -tstep 0.1
    42	
    43	mv results.csv obs_temp.csv
    44	rm -f *.f32
    45	rm -f *.pwlr
    46	rm -f *.pwpr
    47	rm -f *.pfpl
    48	rm -f *.sz3
    49	rm -f *.zfp
```
